pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. Cover page: A snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu) wearing a pink dress with a pink bow on her ear, standing at a bright sunny window in a cozy Suzhou apartment, looking out eagerly with sparkling brown eyes. She holds a hand-drawn card with a heart on it. Spring weather outside, cherry blossoms visible. The room is warm and inviting with toys scattered around. Title mood: anticipation and excitement.

pages.text: 咘咘有一个特别好的朋友，叫水水姐姐。水水姐姐住在好远好远的北京。
pages.text_en: Bubu has a very special friend called Sister Shuishui. Sister Shuishui lives far, far away in Beijing.
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. Split scene showing two cities: on the left, a snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu) wearing a pink dress with pink bow on her ear, waving from a Suzhou garden with traditional white-walled buildings and a canal. On the right, another snow-white rabbit girl (Shuishui, slightly taller) wearing a lavender/light purple dress with a purple hair clip, waving from in front of Beijing landmarks (simplified, colorful Tiananmen gate). A dotted line connects the two cities across the sky with little heart shapes. Both rabbits have big round brown eyes and pink inner ears.

pages.text: 今天，爸爸告诉咘咘一个好消息："水水姐姐要从北京坐飞机来苏州找你玩啦！"
pages.text_en: Today, Dad told Bubu some great news: "Sister Shuishui is flying from Beijing to Suzhou to play with you!"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. A large golden retriever dad (Sam, standard golden fur, wearing a casual dark jacket and scarf) crouching down to eye level with a snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pink dress, pink bow on ear). Dad is smiling warmly, gesturing excitedly. Bubu's eyes are wide open with pure joy, mouth in a big O of surprise, ears perked straight up. Living room of a modern Suzhou apartment, spring light streaming in.

pages.text: 咘咘高兴得跳了起来："太好啦太好啦！我要给水水姐姐准备一个大惊喜！"
pages.text_en: Bubu jumped with joy: "Yay yay! I want to prepare a big surprise for Sister Shuishui!"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. A snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pink dress, pink bow on ear) jumping joyfully in the air with arms raised, big sparkling brown eyes full of excitement. Little star and heart sparkles around her. A gray-brown raccoon in a blue-and-white striped sweater (NOMI) watches happily from a shelf. A small bright red bird (NONO, orange-yellow beak) flutters nearby. Cozy living room, spring afternoon light.

pages.text: 星期天一大早，咘咘拉着爸爸妈妈的手出门了。"我们去给水水姐姐买礼物！"
pages.text_en: Early Sunday morning, Bubu pulled Mom and Dad's hands and headed out. "Let's go buy a gift for Sister Shuishui!"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. A snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pink dress, pink bow) walking between a large golden retriever dad (Sam, golden fur, casual dark jacket) and a black-and-white cow mom (Tina, elegant knit top and skirt). Bubu holds both their hands, pulling them forward eagerly. A charming Suzhou street with traditional architecture, spring trees with fresh green leaves, morning golden light. They are heading toward shops.

pages.text: 商店里有好多好多东西！咘咘看看这个，摸摸那个，每一样都想送给水水姐姐。
pages.text_en: The store was full of wonderful things! Bubu looked at this, touched that — she wanted to give everything to Sister Shuishui.
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. Inside a colorful, warm gift shop. A snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pink dress, pink bow on ear) stands in the middle surrounded by shelves full of cute toys, stuffed animals, colorful hair accessories, stickers, and craft kits. Her big brown eyes are darting excitedly between items, hands reaching toward a purple stuffed animal and a sparkly hair clip at the same time. Warm interior lighting, spring display in the shop window.

pages.text: 最后，咘咘挑了一条紫色的小手链。"水水姐姐最喜欢紫色了，她一定会开心的！"
pages.text_en: Finally, Bubu chose a little purple bracelet. "Sister Shuishui loves purple — she'll be so happy!"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. Close-up of a snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pink dress, pink bow on ear) holding up a delicate purple beaded bracelet with both paws, examining it with a proud, satisfied smile. Her big brown eyes sparkle with love. The bracelet catches the light beautifully. A gift shop counter in the soft background. The black-and-white cow mom (Tina, elegant outfit) smiles approvingly behind her.

pages.text: 回到家，咘咘用彩色纸画了一张卡片，上面写着大大的"欢迎水水姐姐"！
pages.text_en: Back home, Bubu drew a card with colorful paper that said "Welcome Sister Shuishui" in big letters!
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. A snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pink dress, pink bow on ear) sitting at a small desk, drawing on colorful paper with crayons. The card shows two rabbit figures (one pink, one purple) holding hands, with hearts and stars around them. Crayon and art supplies scattered on the desk. A gray-brown raccoon in blue-white striped sweater (NOMI) helps hold the paper steady. Afternoon light through the window.

pages.text: 终于等到了那一天！咘咘站在家门口，踮起脚尖往远处看。"水水姐姐什么时候到呀？"
pages.text_en: The day finally came! Bubu stood at the doorstep, tiptoeing and looking into the distance. "When will Sister Shuishui arrive?"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. A snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pink dress, pink bow on ear) standing on tiptoes at the front door of a Suzhou apartment, one paw shading her eyes as she peers eagerly down the path. She holds the purple bracelet gift (wrapped in a small bag) in her other paw. Spring flowers bloom by the doorstep. Late morning light, anticipation on her face.

pages.text: "来啦来啦！" 远远的，咘咘看到了水水姐姐！水水姐姐穿着漂亮的紫色裙子，朝她跑过来！
pages.text_en: "She's here! She's here!" In the distance, Bubu spotted Sister Shuishui! Shuishui was running toward her in a beautiful purple dress!
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. Two rabbit girls running toward each other on a tree-lined Suzhou path with arms wide open. On the left: snow-white rabbit Bubu wearing pink dress with pink bow. On the right: snow-white rabbit Shuishui (slightly taller) wearing a lavender/light purple dress with a purple hair clip, running joyfully. Both have big sparkling brown eyes and huge smiles. Behind Shuishui: a black-and-white Siberian Husky dad with ice-blue eyes wearing black-rimmed glasses and dark blue polo (Shuishui's dad) and a brown-and-white cow mom wearing white blouse and wide-leg pants with pearl earrings (Shuishui's mom). Spring cherry blossom petals floating in the air.

pages.text: 两个小朋友紧紧抱在一起。"水水姐姐！我好想你！" "咘咘！我也好想你呀！"
pages.text_en: The two friends hugged each other tightly. "Sister Shuishui! I missed you so much!" "Bubu! I missed you too!"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. Close-up of two snow-white rabbit girls hugging warmly. Bubu (pink dress, pink bow on ear) and Shuishui (slightly taller, lavender dress, purple hair clip) embrace tightly with eyes closed and big happy smiles. Little hearts float around them. Their families watch from behind: golden retriever Sam dad (golden fur, dark jacket), black-white cow Tina mom (elegant outfit), black-and-white Siberian Husky Shuishui's dad (ice-blue eyes, black-rimmed glasses, blue polo), brown-white cow Shuishui's mom (white blouse, pearl earrings). All adults smiling warmly. Spring afternoon, cherry blossom petals.

pages.text: "送给你！" 咘咘把紫色手链和卡片递给水水姐姐。水水姐姐的眼睛亮了起来："哇，好漂亮！谢谢咘咘！"
pages.text_en: "For you!" Bubu handed the purple bracelet and card to Shuishui. Shuishui's eyes lit up: "Wow, so pretty! Thank you Bubu!"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. Snow-white rabbit Bubu (pink dress, pink bow) proudly presenting a purple beaded bracelet and a handmade colorful card to snow-white rabbit Shuishui (lavender dress, purple hair clip). Shuishui looks at the gifts with wide sparkling eyes and an amazed open-mouth smile. The card visible shows two rabbits holding hands with hearts. Warm indoor lighting, cozy Suzhou apartment living room.

pages.text: 水水姐姐戴上了紫色手链，然后从书包里拿出一个小盒子："我也给你带了礼物哦！北京的糖葫芦味糖果！"
pages.text_en: Shuishui put on the purple bracelet, then pulled a small box from her backpack: "I brought you a gift too! Candied hawthorn flavored candy from Beijing!"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. Snow-white rabbit Shuishui (lavender dress, purple hair clip, now wearing a purple beaded bracelet on her wrist) holding out a cute red box decorated with traditional Beijing tanghulu (candied hawthorn) designs. Snow-white rabbit Bubu (pink dress, pink bow) reaches for the box with delighted eyes. Both rabbits beaming at each other. Living room with soft lighting.

pages.text: 咘咘学到了一件很重要的事：好朋友就是，不管隔多远，心里都装着对方。等待是值得的，因为见面的那一刻，比什么都甜！
pages.text_en: Bubu learned something very important: true friends always keep each other in their hearts, no matter how far apart. The wait is always worth it, because the moment you meet again is sweeter than anything!
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. Final page: Two snow-white rabbit girls sitting together on a bench in a beautiful Suzhou garden with a canal and arched stone bridge. Bubu (pink dress, pink bow) and Shuishui (lavender dress, purple hair clip, purple bracelet) sit side by side sharing the Beijing candied hawthorn candy, legs swinging happily. A gray-brown raccoon in blue-white striped sweater (NOMI) and a small red bird (NONO) perch nearby. Their families chat in the background. Golden sunset light, cherry blossoms, spring warmth. The scene radiates friendship, love, and the joy of reunion.
